subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses in truth unto a people who understand. There is no God but Him; His is the creation and the command, and all act according to His bidding. O servant, hearken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات بالحق لقوم یفقهون انه ما من اله الا هو له الخلق و الامر و کل بأمره یعملون ان یا عبد اسمع
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @personal instructions, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
